pr.title: Submission Record Series: BatchOpt+MLP4+RoPE100k and 8L EMA Int6 Bigram65k on Single 20GB GPU (val_bpb 1.7810 → 1.3092)

output.summary: Single-GPU 10min/16MB workflow first shrinks batches and widens FFNs with RoPE100k, then shifts to 8L+EMA plus int6 MLP and BigramHash65k with stride-64 eval.
techniques: Staged single-GPU tuning with reduced batches, MLP4, and RoPE100k
8-layer+EMA pass with BigramHash65k vocab and int6-quantized MLP
Stride-64 sliding eval with 1% pruning before quantization
